title: NRG Energy (NRG) Rides on Acquisition, Diverse Customer Base
text: NRG Energy's (NRG) diverse customer base and long-term customer retention strategy increase the predictability of earnings. Its dividend policy boosts shareholders' value.

title: NRG Energy, Inc. Receives Letter from Elliott
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--NRG Energy, Inc. today received a letter and presentation from Elliott Associates, L.P. and Elliott International, L.P. and its affiliates (collectively, “Elliott”) that they have acquired more than thirteen percent (13%) economic interest in the Company. NRG is committed to creating shareholder value and appreciates Elliott's interest. The Company welcomes all shareholders' input and looks forward to an open dialogue with Elliott. title: 5 Conservative And Cheap Dividend Stocks To Invest In - May 2023
text: This article is part of our monthly series where we highlight five companies that are large-cap, relatively safe, dividend-paying and are offering large discounts to their historical norms. We go over our filtering process to select just five conservative DGI stocks from more than 7,500 companies that are traded on U.S. exchanges, including OTC networks.

title: NRG Energy, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2023 Results
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE: NRG) today reported a first quarter 2023 Net Loss of $1.3 billion, or $(5.82) per common share. Adjusted EBITDA for the first quarter was $646 million, Net Cash Used by Operating Activities was $1.6 billion, and Free Cash Flow Before Growth (FCFbG) was $203 million.
